---
title: "Observational Studies"
author: "Prof. Ashraf Fawzy Nabhan"
---

# Hands on

## Essentials

-   Understand the fundamentals of observational studies

-   Assemble the team

    -   Subject area Expert

-   Define the question

-   Draft the study protocol

    -   CRF

    -   Sample size calculation

## **Built on wrong, it cannot be right** 

-   The case of T. Marshall (Int J Epidemiol 2004) 

-   Babies conceived by ICSI (‘cases’) were compared with a 'control' group of normally conceived children. The comparison was made with respect to neurodevelopmental status at 2 years of age.

## Protocol

## Sample size

## CRF

# Ideas

## Question-design pairs

## Brain storming

## Thank you
